instruction: open Recent Apps in virtual Android machine in Android studio

location.label: Recent Apps button (square outline icon) in Android virtual device toolbar
location.name: Recent Apps button (square outline icon) in Android virtual device toolbar
location.reasoning: In the Android Studio emulator extended controls toolbar, the buttons are ordered: Power, Volume Up, Volume Down, Rotate, Recent Apps, Back, Home, etc. The two square icons next to each other represent Rotate and Recent Apps. z18 at [1019, 444] is the second of the two adjacent square icons, which corresponds to the Recent Apps button (simple square outline) in the standard toolbar layout.

history.target_visible_element: Android Studio window with virtual device and toolbar buttons for device controls including Recent Apps
history.reasoning: Stage 1 requires selecting the Android Studio window first. The Android Studio window contains the virtual Android machine (Pixel XL API 34) with its control toolbar at the top. The Recent Apps button is typically a small icon in the device frame toolbar (visible as small icons around y=152-180, x=1790-1906 in the full image, which corresponds to the toolbar above the device). Cropping to the entire Android Studio window preserves all context including the device manager, the running device, and the toolbar with device control buttons (power, volume, recent apps, back, home).

history.target_visible_element: Recent Apps button in virtual device toolbar
history.reasoning: The task requires opening Recent Apps in the virtual Android machine. In the running emulator toolbar (visible at the right side of the Android Studio window), there is a set of device control buttons including power, volume, camera, recent apps, home, and back. I need to crop tightly to the toolbar to identify and select the Recent Apps button. The toolbar icons appear around y=480 in original coordinates. Including all neighboring buttons provides disambiguation context.

history.target_visible_element: Recent Apps button (square icon) in Android virtual device control toolbar
history.reasoning: The device control toolbar is visible with icons for power, volume, rotate, recent apps, back, home, etc. The Recent Apps button is z12 at original center (2099, 735) - the square icon in the device control row. Cropping to the toolbar group to keep all device control buttons in view for disambiguation, since multiple similar-looking icons are present in this row.
